mapper.select: SELECT user_id , user_nm , user_info::text AS user_info FROM om_user_m WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false
SELECT user_id , user_nm , user_info::text AS user_info FROM om_user_m WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false FOR UPDATE
SELECT user_id , user_nm FROM om_user_m WHERE user_id IN #{uid}

SELECT user_id , user_nm , user_info ->> 'corporation_cd' AS corporation_cd , user_info ->> 'grade_cd' AS grade_cd , user_info ->> 'user_type' AS user_type , user_info ->> 'user_status' AS user_status , user_info ->> 'auth_group' AS auth_group , user_info ->> 'mobile_no' AS mobile_no , user_info ->> 'email_id' AS email_id , user_info ->> 'privacy_access' AS privacy_access , user_info ->> 'second_auth_yn' AS second_auth_yn , user_info ->> 'access_ip_limit' AS access_ip_limit , user_info ->> 'access_ip' AS access_ip , (user_info ->> 'password_fail_cnt')::int AS password_fail_cnt , user_info ->> 'last_login_dtm' AS last_login_dtm FROM om_user_m
ORDER BY user_id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE om_user_m SET user_info = #{userInfo}::jsonb , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false
